{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032208101648C003AE1D46703C4BD0"}"},"total":1029},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7560225204283573016","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看，搞笑玩的宗旨就是搞笑嘛，在网上看到一段话，“搞笑文是让观众觉得好笑，而不是里面的角色觉得好笑”感觉这本书是真的诠释了这句话，虽然说里面的梗确实有些多，但是也有很多不包含梗的搞笑情节，至少那些梗在现在的我看来是好笑的，这本文是可以把我逗笑的，那就那它就是一本好的文。看小说就是一种娱乐方式，这本小说让我感觉有了好的体验，那它就是好的小说。而且云朵大王真的超级萌，哈，最重要的是特别癫，我感觉看了这本小说之后，我精神状态都好了不少，就特别喜欢看这种群象文，就是一群少年聚在一起去各种地方闯荡，然后就是希望作者后面不要搞虐的，最最最最最最重要的是作者快点更新！！！[舔屏]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760253630,"group_id":"7257465581396298791","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"努力写作中……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3oQb6GUbSu77dKuKa+mox/1Sc2MgeqOK3jyNoDiM6KY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e9a3562a3e7f4b0fa34ca74ca9eb4734~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701099&x-signature=4x4jTqy%2BfghkGd2ytBRg1oQjSnE%3D","user_id":"1726654035008931","user_name":"雨棠大王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1726654035008931","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7257465581396298791","book_info":{"abstract":"[发疯派＋群像派＋抽象派＋搞笑派]无cp
非传统修仙，⚠⚠⚠过于抽象[划重点⚠⚠⚠]
简冰雾邀她看风景，简冰雾好。
简冰雾推她下诛仙台，简冰雾坏。
简携云乐呵呵赴约，简携云傻。
简携云被推下去，简携云惨。
但是她一个神族的，推她下诛仙台干什么？
这下好了，她不仅活着，还想起来她是胎穿的。
和她一起说，谢谢简冰雾。
成为无心宗小师妹后，简携云玩起来就发狠了，忘情了，陶醉了，差点以一己之力合并四个宗，但是可惜了，宗主不让。
人鱼要拿她做夜明珠，没事的兄弟没事的，去当男妈妈吧，孩子不出来就升天哈。
下毒毒她，百毒不侵怎么毒？那好吧，意思意思睡一下。
惹到了她，很好，就像光脚踩到了一坨黏糊糊的棕色便便，这个微湿又直击心灵的触感，会让你失声尖叫，柔软无力……
恶心人的事情，她简携云做不到不做。
…
提到她，四宗亲传只会异口同声地告诉你:
“简携云，一款适应能力极强的师妹。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a6c160e94204cdbe288fa1f40e30a469","author":"艹容","author_id":"","book_id":"7257465581396298791","book_name":"一颗小师妹，疯了四个宗","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7257466257207722537","read_count":"39071","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"813551"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"392","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,穿越,无CP,搞笑轻松,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/40181e8a45a92fd88eeba649e76708e7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779322216&x-signature=6aj2LbB7LNxKd4m%2FSun4iT6nkkA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1028757674787792","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1717"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032208101648C003AE1D46703C4BD0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读82小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":86,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":173703,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":295253,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":13895},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535831926897410840","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超喜欢这本，感觉我不是带入简携云 ，而是膜拜，他们是鲜活的，是我看过最好看的穿越文了，怎么会有这么好看的书，太热血了，很好笑，我看到的是一群为了和平，为了护苍生的少年们。。。。。。不想写了，这只是评价并不是读后感，我想你们应该自己去看，去感受，还有，作者快更新啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754575698,"group_id":"7257465581396298791","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5B3Kk5UXfCx43rzqvjdJR+pnr2gq8yRikZNker/iNl4","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/20c3494b875a40a9ad32749e40df4cc1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701932&x-signature=K64Pp2YX9RxmeaJ2cx6FaPsum4g%3D","user_id":"3474084608085407","user_name":"汤圆微微甜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3474084608085407","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7257465581396298791","book_info":{"abstract":"[发疯派＋群像派＋抽象派＋搞笑派]无cp
